facebook.caption: 136 reviews. Every single one gives 5 stars. That's not luck. Catamaran VN Phu Quoc runs sailing tours off Phu Quoc and the numbers back it up. Full catamaran. Open water. No crowds packed onto a party boat. Just the kind of day on the water people keep talking about long after they leave. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Sails up, South China Sea ahead. Watch what a 5-star catamaran tour actually looks like off Phu Quoc. 136 people rated this perfect. Now you know why.
